sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Trading the Move, Not the Narrative: (DWSH) Edition
feed.summary: This article provides an AI-generated analysis for Advisorshares Dorsey Wright Short Etf (NASDAQ: DWSH), highlighting a stable neutral reading in shorter horizons that could signal an easing of a long-term weak bias. It outlines an exceptional 19.5:1 risk-reward setup targeting a 6.3% gain with minimal risk, and details three distinct trading strategies for different risk profiles: Position Trading, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging. The analysis also includes multi-timeframe signal analysis indicating support and resistance levels.

feed.title: [Form 4] Alight, Inc. / Delaware Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Alight, Inc.'s Chief Technology Officer, Naveen Baweja, reported significant equity awards in a recent Form 4 filing, consisting of Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and performance stock units. These compensation grants, valued at $0.00 per unit, are designed to align his incentives with the company's long-term performance. The awards include RSU grants totaling 1,233,168 units that vest over three years and 1,250,000 performance stock units tied to specific stock price hurdles over a five-year period.

feed.title: [6-K] ECOPETROL S.A. Current Report (Foreign Issuer) | EC SEC Filing - Form 6-K
feed.summary: Ecopetrol S.A. filed its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on April 30, 2026. This filing fulfills SEC reporting obligations and disseminates information to the NYSE, bondholders, and the broader market. The report includes a detailed business description, risk factors, and IFRS financial statements audited by Deloitte & Touche S.A.S. for 2025 and Ernst & Young Audit S.A.S. for 2023 and 2024.

feed.title: Baiya International Group Inc. Announces Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Baiya International Group Inc. (Nasdaq: BIYA) announced its fiscal year 2025 financial results, reporting a 28.6% increase in net revenues to $16.5 million. This growth was primarily driven by strong performance in project outsourcing and exceptional growth in entrusted recruitment services, despite a reported net loss of $9.5 million. The company aims to further refine its service capabilities and expand its presence in high-growth sectors, while also developing its platform-driven approach to HR solutions.

feed.title: Civista Bancshares (CIVB) grows Q1 2026 earnings with higher NIM and capital
feed.summary: Civista Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: CIVB) showcased strong Q1 2026 results, reporting net income growth of 47% year-over-year to $15 million, driven by a higher net interest margin (NIM) of 3.85% and contributions from recent acquisitions. The company reported robust capital ratios, with a tangible common equity to tangible assets ratio of 9.85% and a tangible book value per share of $19.70. Civista emphasizes its disciplined growth strategy, combining organic expansion with earnings-accretive mergers and acquisitions, and highlights its attractive valuation compared to peers.

feed.title: Warrant vote could unlock $8.7M for Theriva Biologics (TOVX)
feed.summary: Theriva Biologics is holding a special stockholder meeting on June 5, 2026, to approve the issuance of up to 16,184,560 shares of common stock upon the exercise of previously issued warrants at $0.54 per share. This approval could generate approximately $8.7 million in gross proceeds for the company, though it would dilute existing shareholders. Shareholders will also vote on adjourning the meeting if more votes are needed for the warrant exercise proposal.

feed.title: AtlasClear signs fifth correspondent broker-dealer agreement By Investing.com
feed.summary: AtlasClear Holdings, Inc. announced its fifth correspondent broker-dealer agreement through its subsidiary Wilson-Davis & Co., Inc. The company is actively expanding its clearing platform and has several pending acquisitions, including Ark Financial Services and Commercial Bancorp. Analysts view ATCH as undervalued, expecting net income growth this year.

feed.title: Renasant (RNST) director receives 2,060-share restricted stock award under 2020 plan
feed.summary: Renasant Corp (RNST) director Edward Robinson McGraw was granted 2,060 shares of Common Stock as a service-based restricted stock award under the company's 2020 Long Term Incentive Plan. The shares were awarded at no cash cost and are set to vest on April 27, 2027. Following this transaction, McGraw directly holds 245,803 shares of Renasant's common stock.

feed.title: TransCode Therapeutics (NASDAQ: RNAZ) registers 15.96M resale shares by selling holders
feed.summary: TransCode Therapeutics (NASDAQ: RNAZ) has filed a shelf registration (Form S-3) to allow selling stockholders to resell up to 15.96 million shares of common stock. The company will not receive any proceeds from these sales. The filing details the outstanding shares, conversion mechanics for preferred stock, and outlines various clinical and pipeline developments for its therapeutic candidates, including TTX-MC138 and Seviprotimut-L.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor Corp. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor Corp. (ON) saw its stock rise by 2.20% to $103.03 on Friday, outperforming a mixed market session where the S&P 500 Index increased and the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell. This marks the stock's third consecutive day of gains, highlighting its strong performance relative to competitors.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman Honors Top Suppliers Driving Industrial Innovation
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman recently recognized over 30 domestic and global suppliers at its annual Supplier Excellence Awards, highlighting their crucial role in advancing the defense industrial base. These partners were honored for their excellence in manufacturing and supply chain operations, contributing to cutting-edge capabilities in areas like autonomous systems, AI-driven analytics, and advanced materials. The awards celebrate suppliers—including international, large, and small businesses—who demonstrate exceptional performance, strategy, and mission excellence in supporting Northrop Grumman's objectives.

feed.title: Expedia Group Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Expedia Group Inc. (EXPE) saw its stock rise by 1.40% to $251.84 on Friday, even as the broader market had a mixed trading session. The company's stock closed 17.10% below its 52-week high of $303.80 achieved earlier in the year. Expedia's performance outpaced its competitors on this trading day.

feed.title: Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) Price Target Cut to $198.00 by Analysts at DA Davidson
feed.summary: DA Davidson has lowered its price target for Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) from $216 to $198, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 28.55%. This adjustment follows the company's strong Q1 earnings, where it surpassed EPS and revenue expectations and provided positive FY2026 guidance. The consensus price target among analysts for JKHY is approximately $198.77.

feed.title: 49 Gulf Coast seniors sign on for shipyard careers at Ingalls
feed.summary: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding division celebrated its annual "Signing Day" on May 1, 2026, where 49 high school seniors who completed the Ingalls Shipbuilder Academy (ISA) signed contingent employment offers. This program, which trains students in trades like welding and pipefitting, has graduated over 500 students since 2016 and partners with 13 Gulf Coast high schools. The initiative highlights Ingalls' long-term workforce development strategy and commitment to building both ships and careers in the region.

feed.title: U.S. Stocks: Dow Inc fell by 152 dollars, while Nasdaq closed above 25,000 for the first time (on the 1st). ☆Revised
feed.summary: The article reports that the Dow Inc. experienced a decline of $152, while the Nasdaq index achieved a significant milestone by closing above 25,000 for the first time. The publication date is listed as the 1st, indicating recent market activity.

feed.title: Texas Instruments senior VP Gary Mark sells $3.82m in company stock
feed.summary: Gary Mark, Senior Vice President at Texas Instruments, sold 13,689 shares of company stock for $3.82 million after exercising an equal number of stock options. The sale occurred when the stock was trading near its 52-week high, following an 82% return over the past year. InvestingPro analysis suggests TXN is currently overvalued, while recent analyst updates show positive sentiment due to exceeding first-quarter earnings expectations.

feed.title: Northrop says its suppliers support 100,000 jobs and $27.8B a year
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman recognized over 30 domestic and global suppliers with its 2026 Supplier Excellence Awards for their contributions to autonomous systems, AI analytics, advanced materials, and secure cloud infrastructure. These suppliers collectively support over 100,000 jobs and contribute an annual economic impact of $27.8 billion. The company emphasizes its strong partnerships and significant manufacturing capacity in advancing defense technological capabilities for the U.S. and its allies.

feed.title: Stocks to watch on Friday after hours: CTLP, CELU, ULH (CTLP:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: This article highlights several stocks to watch on Friday after hours, including Cantaloupe, Inc. (CTLP), CELU, and ULH. It notes that the stock market closed modestly higher on Friday, starting May on an optimistic note due to retreating oil prices and strong corporate earnings. The S&P 500 rose by 0.3%.

feed.title: O'Reilly Auto Parts could fill Foods Co. site on Gerber Road after sale
feed.summary: O'Reilly Auto Parts is planning to occupy a recently closed Foods Co. location on Gerber Road in Sacramento County's Vineyard area. A retail redevelopment group acquired the site, and plans filed with Sacramento County indicate O'Reilly Auto Parts will be the new tenant.

feed.title: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) Trading Up 2.4% Following Better-Than-Expected Earnings
feed.summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) saw its shares rise by 2.4% after reporting stronger-than-expected Q1 earnings, with EPS of $1.32 against an estimated $1.25 and revenues of $4.76 billion. The company also raised its FY 2026 adjusted EPS guidance to $5.56–$5.72, signaling confidence despite a high dividend payout ratio of 103.16%. Analyst reactions were mixed, with some raising price targets but the overall consensus remaining a "Hold" with an average target of $69.63.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (TXN) VP sells 28,080 shares after option exercises
feed.summary: Texas Instruments Senior Vice President Mark T. Roberts reported exercising options for 17,831 shares and subsequently selling 28,080 shares of company common stock. The sales occurred at weighted average prices between approximately $279 and $281 per share, resulting in a net-sell position. This insider transaction was filed on April 30, 2026, and details the acquired and disposed shares along with their respective prices.

feed.title: DeFi Development (DFDV) launches $200M at-the-market share offering
feed.summary: DeFi Development Corp. (DFDV) has initiated a $200 million "at-the-market" share offering through a sales agreement with R.F. Lafferty & Co., Inc. The company will sell common stock flexibly under an existing Form S-3 shelf registration, using the net proceeds for working capital, acquiring Solana (SOL) digital assets, and other strategic initiatives. The sales agent will receive a commission of up to 0.75% of the gross proceeds.

feed.title: Did Mosaic’s 2030 ESG Overhaul and New Tailings Standard Just Shift MOS’s Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company has introduced refreshed 2030 sustainability targets focusing on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) aspects, including a new global tailings standard. While these initiatives don't immediately impact near-term earnings or commodity prices, they could significantly influence how investors perceive Mosaic's long-term environmental liabilities and free cash flow. This shift may either reinforce a narrative of rising margins for the company or validate concerns about increased compliance costs and potentially weaker long-term returns.

feed.title: iPhone and Services Drive Apple to Record Q2 2026 Despite Supply Constraints
feed.summary: Apple announced record-breaking Q2 2026 financials, driven primarily by strong iPhone sales and an all-time high in Services revenue. Despite supply constraints and rising memory costs, the company achieved double-digit revenue growth across all geographic segments, with significant growth in Greater China and emerging markets. The report also highlighted the upcoming transition of CEO Tim Cook to executive chairman and John Ternus's succession as CEO.

feed.title: [424B2] JPMORGAN CHASE & CO Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is offering callable fixed-rate notes with a 5.25% annual coupon, maturing on May 14, 2038, and callable semi-annually from May 15, 2031, to November 15, 2037. The notes are unsecured obligations, priced between $972.60 and $1,000 per $1,000 principal amount for eligible accounts, with estimated selling commissions. Investors face reinvestment risk due to the call feature and resolution risk related to JPMorgan Chase & Co.'s "single point of entry" resolution strategy, where unsecured creditors may absorb losses in a resolution scenario.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet Ordered to Defend Fraud Claim in Device Deal Case
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings Inc. will face a fraud claim related to its acquisition of a soft tissue repair platform after a Delaware Chancery Court judge denied the company's bid to dismiss the litigation. Former investors of Embody Inc. can pursue a claim seeking up to an additional $47.5 million from the deal, which they allege involved a deceptive deferred payment structure based on false promises of new sales representatives. While the fraud claim proceeds, the medical device giant did succeed in narrowing the scope of the overall legal dispute.

feed.title: PNC's full return to office starts May 4 with expanded shuttles and employee support resources
feed.summary: PNC will require all employees to return to the office full-time starting May 4, a significant change for those who have been working remotely. To support this transition, the bank is expanding shuttle services and employee resources. This move marks the company's permanent shift back to in-person work.

feed.title: CTOS Maintained by DA Davidson -- Price Target Raised to $12.00
feed.summary: DA Davidson has maintained a "Buy" rating for Custom Truck One Source (CTOS) and raised its price target from $8.50 to $12.00, reflecting increased confidence in the company's future. Despite this positive analyst outlook, GuruFocus indicates that CTOS is currently 59.5% overvalued with a GF Value™ of $6.34 against its trading price of $10.11, suggesting caution for investors. The company holds a GF Score™ of 75/100, highlighting strong growth potential, though its financial strength is rated lower at 3/10.

feed.title: ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF Options Spot-On: On May 1st, 463.54K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.49 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: This article reports on the trading activity of the ProShares UltraPro QQQ ETF (TQQQ) options on May 1st. It notes that 463.54K contracts were traded with an open interest of 1.49 million, indicating significant activity for this leveraged ETF tracking the Nasdaq 100.

feed.title: Costco Expands Prepared Foods As Premium Meals Meet Elevated Valuation Concerns
feed.summary: Costco is expanding its prepared food offerings by introducing a new Kirkland Signature Braised Beef With Yukon Mashed Potatoes meal and increasing the availability of Amy's Kitchen organic products. These moves aim to enhance member engagement with convenient, higher-quality food options. Despite a current share price of $1,014.53 and a 179.8% five-year return, Costco's stock is trading approximately 29.4% above Simply Wall St's estimated fair value, suggesting a rich valuation amidst its strategic growth initiatives.

feed.title: Constellation Energy Shareholders Back Board, Pay and Auditor
feed.summary: At its annual meeting on April 28, 2026, Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) shareholders re-elected all eleven director nominees and approved executive compensation. They also ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor but rejected a proposal for additional diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) reporting. This outcome signals support for the company's current governance and pay practices while indicating a lack of shareholder pressure for expanded DEI disclosure.

feed.title: Dianthus Therapeutics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
feed.summary: Dianthus Therapeutics granted equity awards to six new non-executive employees on May 1, 2026. These inducement grants, approved by the company's Compensation Committee, consist of non-qualified stock options for 135,000 shares of common stock with a 10-year term and an exercise price of $87.42 per share. The grants aim to attract new talent and are in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

feed.title: Builders FirstSource Inc. stock underperforms Friday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Builders FirstSource Inc. (BLDR) stock experienced an underperformance on Friday, falling 0.35% while its competitors saw gains. The stock closed at $195.43, below its 52-week high, even as some rivals posted daily increases and positive year-to-date performances.

feed.title: Cytokinetics (CYTK) EVP exercises options and sells 15,000 shares
feed.summary: Andrew Callos, EVP and Chief Commercial Officer of Cytokinetics (CYTK), recently executed an exercise-and-sell transaction. He acquired 15,000 shares by exercising options at $23.26 per share and simultaneously sold these 15,000 shares on the open market for an average of $63.26 per share. Following these transactions, Callos directly holds 58,555 shares of Cytokinetics common stock and 54,000 non-qualified stock options.

feed.title: SLB (SLB) director receives 3,428-share award, now holds 22,099
feed.summary: SLB director Peter John Coleman was granted 3,428 shares of common stock as an equity award on May 1, 2026, under the SLB 2004 Stock and Deferral Plan for Non-Employee Directors. These shares were priced at $0.00, indicating compensation rather than a market purchase. Following this transaction, Coleman directly holds a total of 22,099 shares of SLB common stock.

feed.title: CBOE Global Markets Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: This article reports that CBOE Global Markets Inc. (CBOE) stock outperformed its competitors on a recent trading day. The article appears to be a boilerplate financial news brief reporting on daily stock movements.

feed.title: DECZ Stock Fund Price and Chart — CBOE:DECZ
feed.summary: The TrueShares Structured Outcome (December) ETF (DECZ) aims to moderate S&P 500 losses over a one-year period using options, foregoing some upside but allowing uncapped participation beyond option costs. The fund is actively managed, resets annually, and primarily invests in bonds, with an expense ratio of 0.79% and a current dividend yield of 3.15%. It currently trades at a slight premium to its Net Asset Value (NAV).

feed.title: Cimpress (NASDAQ: CMPR) posts Q3 2026 profit rebound with 12% revenue growth
feed.summary: Cimpress (NASDAQ: CMPR) reported a strong Q3 fiscal year 2026, with revenue increasing by 12% to $886.2 million and net income turning profitable at $14.6 million, compared to a loss in the previous year. The company's year-to-date revenue reached $2.79 billion, up 10%, driven by broad-based growth across all segments and a tuck-in acquisition. Despite high leverage with $1.59 billion in debt, Cimpress maintains liquidity with $189.0 million in cash.

feed.title: Cinemark Holdings, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
feed.summary: Cinemark Holdings, Inc. announced its first quarter 2026 earnings results, providing an executive commentary accessible on its Investor Relations website. The company will host a public audio webcast on May 1, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results. Cinemark, a major global theatrical exhibition company, operates nearly 500 theaters across the U.S. and South/Central American countries, offering advanced cinema technologies and amenities.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: PRI) discloses 5.29% stake in Primerica (1.68M shares)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a 5.29% stake in Primerica, holding 1,677,279 shares of common stock, as reported in a Schedule 13G SEC filing. Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares, but sole voting power over 244,486 shares. This filing indicates a passive investment, consistent with large asset managers.

feed.title: Massive legal hit drives Boston Beer (NYSE: SAM) to Q1 loss
feed.summary: Boston Beer Company reported a significant Q1 2026 GAAP net loss of $145.3 million due to a non-recurring $216.0 million pre-tax litigation expense. Despite this, the company's core operations showed some stability with improved gross margin, and it maintains a strong balance sheet with $164.1 million in cash and no debt. Boston Beer has updated its full-year 2026 guidance to reflect the litigation expense, now projecting a GAAP EPS loss but a positive non-GAAP EPS.

feed.title: Cisco Schedules Conference Call for Q3 Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Cisco Systems Inc. (CSCO) has scheduled a conference call to discuss its Q3 fiscal year 2026 financial results. The announcement was made via a press release distributed by Quantisnow, a platform providing real-time market data and news for investors. The article also provides recent analyst ratings and related SEC filings for Cisco.

feed.title: Distribution Dates and Amounts Announced for Eaton Vance Closed-End Funds
feed.summary: Quantisnow announced that distribution dates and amounts have been released for various Eaton Vance Closed-End Funds. The report highlights several specific funds, including Eaton Vance California Municipal Income Trust, Eaton Vance Senior Floating-Rate Fund, and Eaton Vance Floating Rate Income Trust. This information is provided by Quantisnow, a platform offering real-time market data and news for investors.

feed.title: Truist Shareholders Back Incentive Plan and Governance Slate
feed.summary: Truist Financial shareholders approved an amendment to the 2022 Incentive Plan, re-elected all directors, endorsed executive compensation, and ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor at their April 28, 2026 annual meeting. They also rejected a shareholder proposal regarding customer-policy risk, indicating strong investor support for the company's current governance and strategic direction. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates TFC as Neutral, citing improving profitability and attractive valuation, balanced against weaker cash-flow trends and ongoing margin pressures.

feed.title: Solventum (SOLV) director converts 3,403 RSUs into common stock
feed.summary: Solventum Corp director Wilson Darryl L. exercised 3,403 fully vested Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into common stock on April 30, 2026. This transaction increased his direct holdings to 8,947 shares of Solventum common stock. No open-market purchases or sales were reported in connection with this RSU conversion.

feed.title: Six new Dianthus hires get options to buy 135,000 shares
feed.summary: Dianthus Therapeutics granted inducement equity awards to six new non-executive employees on May 1, 2026, totaling 135,000 non-qualified stock options. These options have a 10-year term, an exercise price of $87.42 per share, and vest over four years. This move is part of the company's ongoing hiring efforts and follows recent significant financial activities.

feed.title: [Form 4] Solventum Corp Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Solventum Corp (SOLV) director Wendell Amy McBride exercised 3,403 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into common shares on April 30, 2026, at a price of $0.00 per share. Following this transaction, McBride directly holds 10,422 shares of Solventum common stock. The RSUs involved were fully vested prior to settlement.

feed.title: Snap-on (SNA) investors reelect full board and back 2026 pay plan
feed.summary: Snap-on Incorporated announced the results of its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, where investors reelected all 10 directors, ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent accounting firm for fiscal 2026, and approved the compensation plan for named executive officers. The proposals received significant shareholder support, with 52,057,343 common shares outstanding and eligible to vote.

feed.title: META (NASDAQ: META) files Form 144 showing RSU lapses and a 392-share sale
feed.summary: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) filed a Form 144 detailing proposed sales of Class A common stock, with Charles Schwab & Co., Inc. listed as the broker and a trade date of May 1, 2026. The filing includes information on Restricted Stock Unit (RSU) lapses from May 2020 (131 units) and May 2024 (278 units), alongside a reported sale of 392 shares on February 25, 2026. The filing sentiment and impact are noted as neutral.

feed.title: Major ADS award lifts CEMEX (CX) CEO’s direct share holdings
feed.summary: CEMEX (CX) CEO Jaime Muguiro Dominguez was granted 333,595 American Depositary Shares (ADS) as an equity award under a Key Value Positions Plan. This grant, valued at $0.00 per share and not an open-market purchase, increases his direct holdings to 576,487 shares. The shares will vest in four equal installments on May 1 of 2026, 2027, 2028, and 2029, linking his compensation to future performance and service.
